creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
These ports all fail to build -- multimedia/vlc devel/gconf2
devel/gnome-vfs -- with this same error. atk has been installed/
reinstalled multiple times. 
===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib
===>   Registering installation for atk-2.0.1
===>   Returning to build of vlc-2.0.4_1,3
Error: shared library "atk-1.0.0" does not exist
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: build any of the listed ports: multimedia/vlc devel/gconf2
devel/gnome-vfs
